name: Statutory Short Form Power of Attorney

sections.heading: Secs. 1-42 to 1-54. Short title: Connecticut Statutory Short Form Power of Attorney Act. Form. Real estate transactions. Chattel and goods transactions. Bond, share and commodity transactions. Banking transactions. Business operating transactions. Insurance transactions. Estate transactions. Claims and litigation. Personal relationships and affairs. Benefits from military service. Records, reports and statements.

body: Sections 1-42 to 1-54 , inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2016.
content.plainText: Sections 1-42 to 1-54 , inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2016.

sections.heading: Secs. 1-55 and 1-56. General authority of agent. Additional provisions authorized in form.

body: Sections 1-55 and 1-56 are repealed, effective October 1, 2016.
content.plainText: Sections 1-55 and 1-56 are repealed, effective October 1, 2016.
